sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n52757" key="kalli/fullos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">καλλῐ´-φυλλος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n52757.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">with beautiful petals</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">ῥόδον</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">Anacreont.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">42.3</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
